name: Daily Visitor Log
query:
SELECT
  l.name as "Log:Link/Visitors Registration Log:120",
  l.visitor as "Visitor:Link/Visitor:120",
  l.full_name as "Full Name::150",
  l.log_type as "Type::80",
  l.time_in as "Time In:Datetime:150",
  l.time_out as "Time Out:Datetime:150",
  l.employee as "Host:Link/Employee:120",
  l.gate_location as "Gate/Location::120",
  l.is_exception as "Exception:Check:80"
FROM `tabVisitors Registration Log` l
WHERE DATE(COALESCE(l.time_in, l.time_out, l.creation)) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
ORDER BY COALESCE(l.time_in, l.time_out) DESC
